message:
test(persist): add golden artifact tests for AOF and RDB encoding

Add 15 golden tests freezing exact persistence format bytes:

AOF format:
- SET command RESP encoding
- Multi-command stream concatenation

RDB format:
- Magic header (REDIS0011)
- Empty database structure
- Auxiliary field (AUX opcode 0xFA)
- Type bytes (string 0x00, list 0x01, set 0x02, hash 0x04, zset 0x05, stream 0x0F)
- SELECTDB opcode (0xFE)
- EXPIRETIME_MS opcode (0xFC)
- EOF marker (0xFF)
- 8-byte CRC64 checksum

These catch accidental format changes that would break persistence
file compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
